rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Ptlfs' Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Set One, And For Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 15, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT ADAM WHITE's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Ptlfs' Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents Set One, And For Sanctions; GRANT as to RFP 6, plaintiff shall produce documents showing the placement of DOT and NOTE into WaMu Mortgage Pass-Through Certificate Series 2007-HY06 Trust. Information is relevant to Plaintiff's quiet title claim pursuant to foreclosure. DENY as to RFP 7, 10, 21 not reasonably calculated to lead to admissible evidence as to quiet title claim or defendant's defenses thereto. GRANT as to RFP 12, 23. Plaintiff shall produce all non-privileged documents and privilege log. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERLINDA SAN JUAN VS. MICHAEL CIOFALO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 15, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT MICHAEL CIOFALO AND EVE SEGASTURE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendants failed to shift burden. Hooshmand Declaration and Ex. 5 to RJN do not provide any evidence as to claims discharged or not discharged in Plaintiff's bankruptcy. All causes of action are referred to by number only. = (501/REQ)
